frr version 9.1
frr defaults traditional
hostname R1
log syslog informational
!
interface eth0
 ip address 10.0.12.1/30
 ip ospf area 0
 ip ospf cost 10
!
interface eth1
 ip address 10.0.13.1/30
 ip access-group ACL_BLOCK_SSH in
 ip ospf area 0
!
ip access-list ACL_BLOCK_SSH
 10 deny tcp any any eq 22
 20 permit any any any
!
ip access-list ACL_WEB_ONLY
 10 permit tcp 10.0.0.0/8 any eq 80
 20 permit tcp 10.0.0.0/8 any eq 443
 30 deny any any any
!
router bgp 65001
 bgp router-id 1.1.1.1
 neighbor 10.0.12.2 remote-as 65002
 neighbor 10.0.13.2 remote-as 65001
 !
 address-family ipv4 unicast
  neighbor 10.0.12.2 activate
  neighbor 10.0.13.2 activate
 exit-address-family
!
router ospf
 ospf router-id 1.1.1.1
 network 10.0.0.0/8 area 0
!
line vty
!
